content.text: {"schemas":[{"elementType":"DomainModels$Entity","schema":{"description":"Entity in the domain model. To add validation rules, ask for DomainModels$ValidationRule schema. To add indices, ask for DomainModels$Index schema.","type":"$constructor","elementType":"DomainModels$Entity","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the entity."},"attributes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"$object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"type":{"type":"anyOfValues","values":["Binary","Boolean","DateTime","HashedString","String","Decimal","Integer","Long","AutoNumber","Enumeration"],"default":"String"},"enumerationName":{"type":"$reference","referredType":"Enumerations$Enumeration","referenceType":"by-name","description":"Set this when attribute type is 'Enumeration' to specify which enumeration to use -- use fully qualified name. Make sure that the enumeration already exists (create new one if necessary)."}}}},"location":{"type":"point","description":"Entity's position in the Studio Pro canvas."},"generalization":{"type":"$reference","referredType":"DomainModels$Entity","referenceType":"by-name","description":"If set, indicates the parent entity this entity extends. If not set, this is a root entity. Example: MyFirstModule.MyParentEntity"},"source":{"type":"$element","elementType":"DomainModels$OqlViewEntitySource","properties":{"sourceDocument":{"type":"$reference","referredType":"DomainModels$ViewEntitySourceDocument","referenceType":"by-name","description":"The ID of the OQL view document that defines the source."}},"required":[],"description":"If set, marks this as a view entity backed by an OQL query. Provide a DomainModels$OqlViewEntitySource element with a sourceDocument reference to the ViewEntitySourceDocument that holds the OQL."}}}},{"elementType":"DomainModels$Attribute","schema":{"description":"Represents an attribute (property/field) of an entity with a specific data type and value storage method.","type":"$constructor","elementType":"DomainModels$Attribute","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the attribute."},"type":{"type":"anyOfValues","values":["Binary","Boolean","DateTime","HashedString","String","Decimal","Integer","Long","AutoNumber","Enumeration"],"description":"Describes what are possible types of the attribute.","default":"String"},"enumerationName":{"type":"$reference","referredType":"Enumerations$Enumeration","referenceType":"by-name","description":"Set this when attribute type is 'Enumeration' to specify which enumeration to use -- use fully qualified name. Make sure that the enumeration already exists (create new one if necessary)."}}}}]}
